creator: edwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Please submit this request on the mailinglist ports@FreeBSD.org to 
find volunteers, or take the step of being famous worlwide and make 
the port yourself! See http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/index.html for the details on how to do this.
